title: Diagnostic event
description: Structured diagnostic event emitted over /ws and tee'd into agent/diagnostics/.

code.description: Stable error code, e.g. E_OANDA_AUTH, E_PARSE_PRICE, W_FEATURE_NAN.

crate.description: Workspace crate that emitted the diagnostic.

raw_log_path.description: Optional path to raw log for failure-first reproduction.
